summary: Loading state displays correctly with proper heading and mobile layout, but uses generic gray UI palette instead of brand diner aesthetic required for consistency

violations.description: Admin interface uses generic gray/neutral palette instead of maintaining brand diner palette consistency with public surfaces - dark sidebar and neutral backgrounds create visual discontinuity from public brand treatment

actions: Apply diner brand palette to admin interface - use teal backgrounds, cream surfaces, and ink borders consistent with public marketing chrome
Replace generic gray sidebar with brand-appropriate color treatment
Ensure loading state maintains visual continuity with public surface brand identity
